paper.title_en: Modified Cosmology from Mass-to-Horizon Relation: Background Evolution
paper.abstract_en: We investigate the cosmological implications of the mass-to-horizon relation, which provides a unified framework for thermodynamically consistent generalized horizon-entropy functionals. Using the Cai-Kim formulation of the first law of thermodynamics, we derive the corresponding modified Friedmann equations and examine the resulting background evolution. We find that cosmological viability sharply restricts admissible deviations from the Bekenstein-Hawking area law: phenomenologically acceptable scenarios are confined to a narrow neighborhood of the standard entropy, while more pronounced deviations generically spoil the standard radiation-matter-dark-energy sequence. Power-law entanglement corrections can give rise to a moderate early-dark-energy component, but only within a tightly constrained region of parameter space, whereas quantum-gravity corrections are suppressed by the Planck scale and remain observationally irrelevant. Consequently, all viable models predict a $Λ$CDM-like cosmological background at the present epoch. These findings demonstrate that background cosmology alone imposes stringent constraints on thermodynamically consistent generalized entropy constructions of this class.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文研究了质量-视界关系的宇宙学含义，属于黑洞热力学在宇宙学中的应用，与黑体热力学主题高度相关。理论深度高，方法严谨，清晰度好。
decision.title_zh: 质量-视界关系修正宇宙学：背景演化
decision.abstract_zh: 我们研究了质量-视界关系的宇宙学含义，该关系为热力学一致的一般化视界熵泛函提供了一个统一框架。利用Cai-Kim热力学第一定律公式，我们推导了相应的修正弗里德曼方程，并考察了由此产生的背景演化。我们发现，宇宙学可行性严格限制了与Bekenstein-Hawking面积定律的可允许偏差：现象学上可接受的场景被限制在标准熵的窄邻域内，而更显著的偏差通常会破坏标准的辐射-物质-暗能量序列。幂律纠缠修正可以产生适度的早期暗能量成分，但仅限于参数空间的一个紧致约束区域，而量子引力修正被普朗克尺度抑制，在观测上不相关。因此，所有可行的模型在当今时代都预言了ΛCDM类宇宙学背景。这些发现表明，背景宇宙学本身对此类热力学一致的一般化熵构造施加了严格约束。
